case_title: NEIL LEUTHOLD VS. LOMBARDI SPORTS, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEUTHOLD, NEIL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOMBARDI SPORTS, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
